feature: Unscheduled work side panel lists items lacking a due date and supports drag-to-schedule
last_worker_summary: Updated `tests/calendar/unscheduled.panel.spec.mjs`. The root cause was that `isVisible()` (non-waiting) returned `false` while the panel was still rendering — triggering a toggle click that *closed* the in-flight panel; the fix replaces it with `waitFor({ state: 'visible', timeout: 8000 })` so we only click the toolbar toggle if the panel genuinely hasn't appeared after 8 seconds, and if we do click we then explicitly `waitFor` the panel before proceeding to the four `toBeVisible` assertions.
mutation_failure_reason: saboteur declined to edit (feature may not live in src/); mutation contract not verified
